data.title: PomDoctor Shifts to Predictive Healthcare Infrastructure With Strategic Upgrade
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from PomDoctor Ltd. Unsponsored ADR ( (POM) ) is now available.

On July 2, 2026, PomDoctor Limited announced a strategic upgrade that repositions the business from a traditional online healthcare platform to a foundational infrastructure provider for predictive healthcare data and services. The move centers on integrating wearable devices, AI analytics, physician services, real-world data and healthcare payment networks into a closed-loop ecosystem aimed at continuous, personalized and proactive care.

Management framed the shift as a response to structural trends including the rising chronic disease burden, advances in AI and remote monitoring technologies, and evolving reimbursement models that favor prevention and long-term outcomes. By building a multi-dimensional health data platform and diversified revenue model beyond pharmaceutical sales, PomDoctor seeks to strengthen its industry positioning in digital medicine and support global expansion, with the U.S. cited as a key next step.

The company’s “healthcare intelligence flywheel” concept links real-time data capture via wearables to AI-driven risk prediction and physician intervention, reinforced by insurance integration to enable value-based care. As platform usage grows, PomDoctor expects its data assets and AI capabilities to compound, potentially enhancing service quality and attracting more stakeholders across the healthcare ecosystem.

Spark’s Take on POM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, POM is a Underperform.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance: widening losses, negative equity, rising debt, and sharply worsening cash burn in 2025. Technicals also detract, with the stock trading below major moving averages. Valuation signals are limited because the company is unprofitable (negative P/E) and provides no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on POM stock,
click here.

More about PomDoctor Ltd. Unsponsored ADR

PomDoctor Limited (NASDAQ: POM) is a China-based digital healthcare company specializing in online medical services for chronic disease patients. Leveraging physician networks, wearable technologies, artificial intelligence and healthcare payment systems, it focuses on building predictive, continuous and data-driven healthcare solutions for patients, providers and other ecosystem participants.

The company operates a leading online medical services platform for chronic diseases, integrating real-world health data to support personalized care. Its strategic emphasis is on developing healthcare infrastructure that enables long-term disease management and improved outcomes rather than episodic consultations and pharmaceutical sales.

Average Trading Volume: 426,753

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $12.23M

data.title: China Vanke Pledges RMB1.14 Billion in Receivables to Secure Shenzhen Metro Loan
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

China Vanke Co ( (HK:2202) ) has issued an update.

China Vanke has entered into a new pledge agreement involving its controlling subsidiary Beijing Zhongsheng Xingjian Real Estate Development Co., Ltd. and substantial shareholder Shenzhen Metro Group. The agreement leverages accounts receivable from a specific project, underscoring the developer’s continued dependence on asset-backed financing to maintain stability in its capital structure.

Under the pledge agreement, Beijing Zhongsheng Xingjian will pledge RMB1,140 million in accounts receivable to Shenzhen Metro Group as security for an existing loan of the same amount to China Vanke. All parties will complete pledge registration and arrange repayments according to the loan and pledge terms, formalizing the connected transaction and providing additional assurance to lenders and other stakeholders regarding the company’s repayment performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2202) stock is a Sell
with a HK$2.70 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on China Vanke Co stock,
see the HK:2202 Stock Forecast page.

More about China Vanke Co

China Vanke Co., Ltd. is a major Chinese real estate developer operating through controlling subsidiaries across the mainland market. The group focuses on property development and related projects, and its capital structure involves substantial shareholders such as Shenzhen Metro Group, reflecting close ties with state-linked infrastructure and urban development entities.

The company’s operations rely on project-based cash flows and receivables, and it actively uses secured financing arrangements to support liquidity and meet repayment obligations.

data.title: Audax Renovables Challenges Rival Deal in Elmera Takeover Battle
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

The latest announcement is out from Audax Renovables SA ( (ES:ADX) ).

Audax Renovables has reiterated its interest in acquiring all outstanding shares of Norwegian electricity retailer Elmera Group ASA through an all‑cash voluntary offer of NOK 41.20 per share, backed by committed financing and designed with a relatively low acceptance threshold to maximise completion certainty for Elmera shareholders. However, the Elmera board has opted to proceed with an alternative transaction involving a combination of two major Norwegian electricity retailers, a deal Audax warns could face competition concerns and greater regulatory risk, while the Spanish group signals it will reassess capital allocation as it balances this opportunity against other long‑term strategic options for shareholders.

Audax argues its proposed transaction offers lower execution complexity and limited regulatory risk compared with the rival deal, positioning itself as a new, well‑funded entrant to the Nordic power retail market. The company’s insistence on due diligence access and emphasis on shareholder value highlight ongoing strategic manoeuvring in the sector, as consolidation pressures and competition scrutiny shape the landscape for utilities, regulators and consumers in Norway and beyond.

More about Audax Renovables SA

Audax Renovables, S.A. is a listed Spanish energy company focused on renewable power generation and electricity retailing, with an expanding presence in European markets. The group actively pursues strategic investments and acquisitions to strengthen its position in liberalised power markets, including the Nordic region.

Average Trading Volume: 339,546

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €548.7M

data.title: New Century Healthcare Refreshes Board With Independent Healthcare Investor
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. ( (HK:1518) ) just unveiled an announcement.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. announced changes to its board, with non-executive director Mr. Wang Siye resigning effective June 30, 2026, citing work adjustments. The board noted that Mr. Wang has no disagreements with directors and expressed gratitude for his contributions, indicating a smooth and orderly transition in governance.

The company appointed Mr. Qiu Xiang as a new non-executive director effective July 2, 2026, bringing extensive healthcare investment experience and multiple directorships in medical and biotech firms. Mr. Qiu will serve an initial three-year term without remuneration, reinforcing the board’s focus on sector expertise and potentially strengthening New Century Healthcare’s strategic positioning and investor confidence.

The board stated that Mr. Qiu has no prior roles within the group, no relationships with existing management or major shareholders, and no shareholding in the company, underscoring his independence. This appointment aligns with listing rule requirements and highlights the firm’s attention to corporate governance, transparency, and oversight as it continues to operate in the competitive Chinese healthcare market.

More about New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd.

New Century Healthcare Holding Co. Ltd. operates in the healthcare sector, providing medical services in China. The company is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange and is overseen by a board that includes executive and non-executive directors, reflecting its focus on governance and strategic oversight in a regulated market.

The group’s leadership structure incorporates non-executive directors from investment and healthcare-related backgrounds. This board composition underscores its emphasis on industry expertise and capital markets experience as it navigates the evolving Chinese healthcare landscape and regulatory environment.

Average Trading Volume: 143,291

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$195.2M

data.title: Sparebanken Norge Calls Perpetual Bond SBNOR113 PRO for 2026 Redemption
data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

Sparebanken Vest ( (SPIZF) ) has provided an announcement.

Sparebanken Norge has decided to exercise its call option on the perpetual bond loan SBNOR113 PRO, identified by ISIN NO0011032328, and will redeem it at par value. The bond’s maturity will effectively be set to July 23, 2026, which may adjust the bank’s funding profile and could influence investors’ expectations around its future capital management and issuance strategy.

The redemption at a price of 100 indicates investors will receive full principal back, underscoring the bank’s intent to actively manage its outstanding hybrid or perpetual instruments. This move aligns with continuing obligations in the Norwegian market and signals Sparebanken Norge’s focus on maintaining regulatory compliance while potentially reshaping its long-term funding and capital structure mix.

More about Sparebanken Vest

Sparebanken Norge is a Norwegian financial institution operating in the banking sector, with a focus on treasury and funding activities in the domestic capital market. The bank issues bond loans as part of its capital structure and actively manages these instruments to optimize funding costs and regulatory capital requirements.

data.description:
4th of July Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

DL Holdings Group Limited ( (HK:1709) ) has provided an announcement.

DL Holdings Group Limited has issued a clarification regarding its previously announced proposed bonus issue of shares, amending the expected commencement date of trading in the bonus shares on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange to 5 October 2026. The company emphasized that this change is purely a correction of timing and that all other information and terms relating to the bonus share issue remain accurate and unchanged, providing certainty to shareholders and the market about the implementation schedule.

The board, led by Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Chen Ningdi, reiterated that the clarification is supplemental to the June 30 announcement and does not alter the substance of the proposed bonus issue. By confirming that no other details are affected, DL Holdings aims to maintain transparency with investors and ensure orderly preparation for the upcoming bonus share listing and subsequent trading.

More about DL Holdings Group Limited

DL Holdings Group Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed on the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong under stock code 1709. The group operates in the investment and financial services sector, focusing on wealth management and related advisory services for high-net-worth clients and institutional investors in the Greater China region and beyond.

Corazon Mining Limited has notified the ASX of a proposed issue of up to 1,000 ordinary fully paid shares under a placement or similar equity mechanism. It leverages standard ASX disclosure and quotation processes, including the use of Appendix 3B for proposed security issues and subsequent Appendix 2A filings. data.title: Cloetta’s CandyKing Pilots Swedish Pick & Mix Candy in U.S. Retail
data.description:
End of Quarter Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock powerful investing tools and data-driven insights with TipRanks Premium for more confident investment decisions.
  • Discover top stock picks and new investment opportunities through TipRanks' Smart Investor Newsletter.

An update from Cloetta AB ( ($SE:CLA.B) ) is now available.

Cloetta’s CandyKing brand is expanding its reach beyond Europe, leveraging the global buzz around Swedish candy, which is prized for its quality and diverse flavors and shapes. The company’s pick & mix concept is already established in around 4,000 European retail outlets and aims to build on this foothold with bold international growth ambitions.

Cloetta has signed an agreement with New York premium supermarket chain DeCicco & Sons to pilot a large in-store CandyKing pick & mix solution, making it the first Swedish candy-based retail concept in U.S. grocery. The Brewster store installation, launched ahead of Independence Day, marks a strategic step in Cloetta’s North American expansion, with planned roll-out to additional DeCicco & Sons locations after the pilot, underscoring the company’s drive to capture rising U.S. demand for Swedish confectionery.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:CLA.B) stock is a Buy
with a SEK59.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cloetta AB stock,
see the SE:CLA.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Cloetta AB

Cloetta AB is a leading confectionery company in Northern Europe, best known for its CandyKing pick & mix brand founded in Stockholm in 1984. CandyKing has a strong presence across grocery stores, cinemas, amusement parks and airports in the Nordics and wider Europe, offering curated assortments of high-quality Swedish candy to consumers.
